Video.summary: Anna Leigh Waters and Leigh Waters take on Allison Harris and Simone Jardim in this Women's Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: This thrilling Group C matchup in the Men’s Doubles Open division features Edward Turney & Ben Cawston against Auto Stephens & Nick Hobbis. Filmed at the Bolton Arena during the 2023 English Nationals, the match showcases intense volleys, smart shot selection, and some of the best defensive play of the tournament. Don’t miss this showdown from the heart of England’s pickleball scene.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis

Video.summary: Scott Crandall & Jose Derisi taking on Stefan Andren & Rick Witsken for Bronze Medal in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal

Video.summary: In this high-stakes Bronze Medal match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, veteran competitors Jenny Klitch and Sheri Courter go head-to-head with Ellen Novoseletsky and Jenny Marcos. Expect calculated teamwork, steady hands, and sharp strategy as these seasoned senior pros compete for a podium finish. Filmed live from Naples, Florida, this match showcases the competitive spirit and skill that define senior pro pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

Video.summary: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 1, Day 1 of the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, live from The Pickler in Noblesville. This crucial Collegiate Team Match features the University of Wisconsin Madison battling a developing Purdue University squad. This match is pool play for seeding, with teams competing for one of eight bids to the National Championship and a share of the $5,000 prize money.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Video.title: NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah
NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

Video.summary: NCPA Round of 32: San Diego State University vs. Utah Tech University
Video.title: NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Video.summary: Welcome back to the mixed pro doubles semifinal from Naples, Florida. This intense match features the teams of Rianna Livornese and Riley Bohnert against Marty Dancuart and Cody Braverman. The match is a thrilling display of skill, including powerful drives and dinks. The broadcast highlights a "golden pickle" moment and the commentator, Gigi LeMaster, provides expert insight into the strategic play of both teams as they battle for a spot in the final.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Video.summary: Watch a Mixed Pro Age pickleball match between the team of Shelby Bates and a partner against the team of Rob Contratto and Renee Chang. This video highlights a matchup of athletes with diverse athletic backgrounds. The caption file reveals that Rob Contratto was a professional ice hockey player and Renee Chang played rugby and soccer in college. Catch all the dinks, volleys, and strategic plays as these two teams battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
